scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @quanyu/web" "npm run dev --workspace @quanyu/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @quanyu/shared && npm run build --workspace @quanyu/api && npm run build --workspace @quanyu/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @quanyu/web && npm run lint --workspace @quanyu/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @quanyu/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @quanyu/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @quanyu/web
